entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop being studied for resistance to fungal invasion and aflatoxin production

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: The fungus responsible for seed invasion, colonization, and aflatoxin production

entities.name: SEED INVASION
entities.description: The process by which Aspergillus flavus enters the groundnut seed

entities.name: COLONIZATION
entities.description: The process by which Aspergillus flavus establishes itself within the groundnut seed

entities.name: AFLATOXIN
entities.description: The toxin produced by toxigenic strains of Aspergillus flavus

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: The presence of aflatoxins in groundnut seeds

entities.name: J11
entities.description: A commercial Indian groundnut cultivar resistant to seed invasion

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO SEED INVASION
entities.description: The ability of groundnut cultivars to prevent seed invasion and colonization by Aspergillus flavus

entities.name: FUNGAL POD ROT
entities.description: A disease affecting groundnut pods caused by fungi

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO FUNGAL POD ROT
entities.description: The ability of groundnut cultivars to resist fungal pod rot

relationships.description: no direct relationship found between resistance and quantity produced
